questions.question: A shipping company uses the function $f(x) = 2x + 5$ to calculate delivery times. Which of the following is the inverse function?
If a function $f(x)$ has an inverse, then $f(x)$ is:
The function $f(x) = x^2$ does not have an inverse because it is:

options.A: not defined for all real numbers

questions.question: A traffic flow model uses the function $f(x) = 3x - 2$ to calculate traffic volume. What is the inverse function?

A logistics company uses the function $f(x) = x^3 - 2$ to calculate shipping costs. Which of the following is the inverse function?
The function $f(x) = e^x$ has an inverse because it is:

options.E: not defined for all real numbers

questions.question: A delivery service uses the function $f(x) = \frac{1}{x}$ to calculate delivery times. Which of the following is the inverse function?
A transportation company uses the function $f(x) = 2x^2 + 3$ to calculate transportation costs. Find the inverse function and verify that it is indeed the inverse.
A shipping company uses the function $f(x) = x^3 - 2x + 1$ to calculate shipping costs. Determine if the function has an inverse and explain your reasoning.

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Encourage students to use algebraic methods to find inverse functions.
Tip 2: Remind students to verify inverses using composition.
Tip 3: Emphasize the importance of interpreting inverses in real-world contexts.
